Title: Product Listing Page Loads with Redeem Voucher Buttons
Description: Verify that each product card displays a Redeem Voucher button when the page loads
Preconditions:
1. Application is running and accessible
2. User has internet connection
3. Browser supports JavaScript
Test Steps:
1. Open web browser
2. Navigate to the application URL
3. Wait for page to fully load
4. Observe the product listing section
Expected Result:
1. Page loads without errors
2. Multiple product cards are displayed
3. Each product card contains a 'Redeem Voucher' button
4. Buttons are clearly visible and properly styled with orange color

Title: Redeem Voucher Button Styling and Visibility
Description: Verify the visual styling and prominence of Redeem Voucher buttons
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Multiple products are visible
Test Steps:
1. Examine each product card on the page
2. Locate the Redeem Voucher button on each card
3. Check button styling and color
4. Verify button text is clearly readable
5. Compare styling with other buttons on the page
Expected Result:
1. Redeem Voucher button has distinct orange styling (cr-voucher-btn class)
2. Button text 'Redeem Voucher' is clearly readable
3. Button is prominently placed within product actions area
4. Styling is consistent across all product cards
5. Button stands out from other buttons

Title: Redeem Voucher Button Click Opens Modal
Description: Verify clicking Redeem Voucher button opens the voucher modal with correct product information
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. At least one product with Redeem Voucher button is visible
Test Steps:
1. Identify a specific product on the page (e.g., SORRENTO Fabric Modular Sofa)
2. Click the 'Redeem Voucher' button for that product
3. Observe the page behavior
4. Check if modal appears
5. Verify modal content
Expected Result:
1. Voucher redemption modal opens immediately
2. Modal displays 'Redeem Gift Voucher' title
3. Modal shows the specific product name (e.g., 'SORRENTO Fabric Modular Sofa')
4. Modal contains voucher code input field
5. Modal has Redeem and Cancel buttons
6. Modal overlay covers the background

Title: Multiple Product Button Interaction
Description: Verify that different product Redeem Voucher buttons pass correct product information
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Multiple products are visible (at least 3)
Test Steps:
1. Click Redeem Voucher button for first product (SORRENTO)
2. Verify modal shows correct product name
3. Close modal by clicking Cancel
4. Click Redeem Voucher button for second product (HARLOW)
5. Verify modal shows correct product name
6. Close modal
7. Click Redeem Voucher button for third product (AVA)
8. Verify modal shows correct product name
Expected Result:
1. Each modal opening shows the correct product name
2. SORRENTO button opens modal with 'SORRENTO Fabric Modular Sofa'
3. HARLOW button opens modal with 'HARLOW Side Table'
4. AVA button opens modal with 'AVA Bed'
5. Product information is accurately passed to modal
Notes: Ensures product-specific data passing works correctly

Title: Modal Close and Cancel Functionality
Description: Verify modal can be closed and doesn't affect other functionality
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Voucher modal is open
Test Steps:
1. Open voucher modal by clicking any Redeem Voucher button
2. Click the 'Cancel' button in modal
3. Verify modal closes
4. Try clicking other buttons on the page (Add to Cart)
5. Open voucher modal again
6. Close by clicking outside modal area (if applicable)
Expected Result:
1. Cancel button closes the modal immediately
2. Background page becomes interactive again
3. Other page functionality (Add to Cart) continues to work
4. Modal can be reopened without issues
5. Page state is preserved after modal interactions
Notes: Tests modal lifecycle and page interaction

Title: Responsive Design - Desktop View
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher buttons display correctly on desktop screens
Preconditions:
1. Desktop browser (screen width >= 1024px)
2. Product listing page loaded
Test Steps:
1. Resize browser window to desktop size (1920x1080)
2. Refresh the page if needed
3. Examine product cards layout
4. Check Redeem Voucher button positioning
5. Verify button sizing and spacing
6. Test button hover effects
Expected Result:
1. Product cards display in grid layout
2. Redeem Voucher buttons are properly positioned in product actions area
3. Buttons maintain consistent sizing across products
4. Hover effects work correctly (color change to darker orange)
5. Buttons remain fully clickable and accessible
6. Text is clearly readable at desktop size

Title: Responsive Design - Tablet View
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher buttons maintain functionality on tablet devices
Preconditions:
1. Browser window resized to tablet dimensions (768px width)
2. Product listing page loaded
Test Steps:
1. Resize browser window to tablet width (768px)
2. Refresh page to apply responsive styles
3. Check product card layout adapts properly
4. Verify Redeem Voucher button visibility
5. Test button tap functionality
6. Check button sizing is appropriate for touch
Expected Result:
1. Product cards adapt to tablet layout
2. Redeem Voucher buttons remain visible and accessible
3. Button size is appropriate for touch interaction
4. Tap functionality works correctly
5. Modal opens properly on button tap
6. All text remains readable

Title: Responsive Design - Mobile View
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher buttons work correctly on mobile devices
Preconditions:
1. Browser window resized to mobile dimensions (480px width)
2. Product listing page loaded
Test Steps:
1. Resize browser window to mobile width (480px)
2. Refresh page to apply mobile styles
3. Verify product card layout on mobile
4. Check Redeem Voucher button accessibility
5. Test button tap on mobile view
6. Verify modal displays properly on small screen
Expected Result:
1. Product cards stack vertically on mobile
2. Redeem Voucher buttons remain fully functional
3. Button size is optimized for mobile touch
4. Modal adapts to mobile screen size
5. Modal content remains readable on small screen
6. Touch interactions work smoothly

Title: Accessibility - Keyboard Navigation
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher buttons are accessible via keyboard navigation
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Keyboard focus is available
Test Steps:
1. Click on browser address bar to reset focus
2. Press Tab key multiple times to navigate through page elements
3. Locate Redeem Voucher buttons using Tab navigation
4. Press Enter key when focused on a Redeem Voucher button
5. Verify modal opens
6. Navigate within modal using Tab key
Expected Result:
1. Redeem Voucher buttons receive keyboard focus
2. Focus indicator is clearly visible on buttons
3. Enter key successfully opens voucher modal
4. Tab order is logical and predictable
5. Modal elements are keyboard accessible
6. User can navigate entire workflow using only keyboard

Title: Accessibility - Screen Reader Support
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher buttons have proper ARIA labels for screen readers
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Screen reader simulation or inspection tools available
Test Steps:
1. Inspect the HTML of Redeem Voucher buttons
2. Check for aria-label attributes
3. Verify aria-label content is descriptive
4. Test with screen reader software if available
5. Check tabindex attributes
Expected Result:
1. Each Redeem Voucher button has aria-label attribute
2. Aria-label contains product-specific information (e.g., 'Redeem Voucher for SORRENTO Fabric Modular Sofa')
3. Buttons have proper tabindex values (tabindex='0')
4. Screen reader announces button purpose clearly
5. Product names are included in accessibility labels

Title: Negative Test - Page Load Without JavaScript
Description: Verify graceful degradation when JavaScript is disabled
Preconditions:
1. Browser with JavaScript disabled
2. Product listing page URL available
Test Steps:
1. Disable JavaScript in browser settings
2. Navigate to product listing page
3. Wait for page to load
4. Examine page content and functionality
5. Check if Redeem Voucher buttons are present
Expected Result:
1. Page loads basic content without JavaScript errors
2. Product information is still displayed
3. Redeem Voucher buttons may be present but non-functional
4. No JavaScript errors appear in console
5. Page gracefully degrades functionality

Title: Negative Test - Rapid Button Clicking
Description: Verify system handles rapid clicking of Redeem Voucher button
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Voucher modal is not open
Test Steps:
1. Locate a Redeem Voucher button
2. Click the button rapidly 5-10 times in quick succession
3. Observe system behavior
4. Check if multiple modals open
5. Verify page responsiveness
Expected Result:
1. Only one modal opens regardless of rapid clicking
2. System prevents duplicate modal instances
3. Page remains responsive during rapid clicks
4. No JavaScript errors occur
5. Modal functionality remains intact
Notes: Prevents UI bugs from rapid user interaction

Title: Negative Test - Modal State Conflict
Description: Verify behavior when multiple modal triggers are attempted
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. One voucher modal is already open
Test Steps:
1. Open voucher modal by clicking first product's Redeem Voucher button
2. Without closing modal, try clicking Redeem Voucher button on different product
3. Observe system behavior
4. Check modal content and state
5. Verify proper modal management
Expected Result:
1. Second button click either has no effect or properly replaces modal content
2. No multiple modals appear simultaneously
3. Modal state remains consistent
4. System handles modal conflicts gracefully
5. User interface remains stable

Title: Edge Case - Very Long Product Names
Description: Verify button and modal behavior with long product names
Preconditions:
1. Test environment with product having very long name
2. Product listing page loaded
Test Steps:
1. Locate product with longest name
2. Check Redeem Voucher button layout
3. Click button to open modal
4. Verify modal displays long product name correctly
5. Check for text truncation or overflow
Expected Result:
1. Button layout accommodates product name length
2. Modal displays full product name without overflow
3. Text wrapping works correctly in modal
4. UI elements remain properly aligned
5. No layout breaking occurs
Notes: Tests UI robustness with edge case data

Title: Integration Test - Add to Cart and Redeem Voucher Workflow
Description: Verify Redeem Voucher functionality doesn't interfere with Add to Cart
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page is loaded
2. Cart functionality is working
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add to Cart' button for first product
2. Verify cart count increases
3. Click 'Redeem Voucher' button for same product
4. Complete voucher redemption process
5. Verify cart count is preserved
6. Test both functionalities work independently
Expected Result:
1. Add to Cart functionality works correctly
2. Cart count increases when items added
3. Redeem Voucher functionality works independently
4. Cart state is preserved during voucher operations
5. Both features can be used for same product
6. No interference between features

Title: Performance Test - Page Load with Multiple Products
Description: Verify page performance with all Redeem Voucher buttons
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page with multiple products
2. Browser developer tools available
Test Steps:
1. Open browser developer tools
2. Navigate to Network tab
3. Load product listing page
4. Measure page load time
5. Check for any performance issues with button rendering
6. Verify all buttons load and render properly
Expected Result:
1. Page loads within acceptable time (< 3 seconds)
2. All Redeem Voucher buttons render correctly
3. No performance bottlenecks in button creation
4. Page remains responsive after full load
5. Button click response time is immediate
6. No memory leaks from button event handlers
Notes: Performance validation for multiple button instances

Title: Security Test - Button Event Handler Integrity
Description: Verify button click handlers cannot be maliciously modified
Preconditions:
1. Product listing page loaded
2. Browser developer console access
Test Steps:
1. Open browser developer console
2. Attempt to access button click handlers
3. Try to modify button behavior through console
4. Test if malicious code injection is possible
5. Verify button security measures
Expected Result:
1. Button click handlers are properly encapsulated
2. Direct manipulation of handlers is prevented
3. No successful code injection through button interactions
4. Security measures protect against XSS
5. Button functionality remains secure
Notes: Basic security validation for button implementation
